entity: 2012-13 Miami Heat regular-season record 66-16 (the 27-game winning streak season, 1-seed in East, eventual back-to-back NBA champions)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (66-16, 1st in East/Southeast). MIA's 27-game streak (Feb 3 - Mar 27) is the 2nd-longest in NBA history. Pairs with the finals_result.2013_mia_sas fixture for the title-winning season.
